commands: kubectl get pods -A -o wide 2>&1 | grep -iE 'backend|api-backend' || echo '(no row match)'
echo '=== First 50 pods (if no backend string in name) ==='

kubectl get pods -A -o jsonpath='{range .items[*]}{.metadata.namespace}{" "}{.metadata.name}{"\n"}{end}' 2>/dev/null | while read -r NS POD; do case "$POD" in *backend*|*api-backend*) echo "----- $NS $POD -----"; kubectl describe pod -n "$NS" "$POD" 2>&1 | grep -iE 'Name:|Namespace:|Restart|Last State|Reason:|Exit Code|OOM|Limits:|Requests:|memory:|Memory:|State:|Warning|Killed|Allocated resources'; echo '';; esac; done
